title: Senior Financial Analyst - PayU Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - PayU Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
PayU Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PayU Digital Technologies:
PayU Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU Digital Technologies!
